commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6ff3c684e9cd757636829a4b04b3b1032aeac156)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a QA Lab UX Matrix evidence scenario and carries stacked Evidence Archive server/UI support for loading the generated QA evidence bundle.

PR surface: Source +2370, Tests +1822, Other +33. Total +4225 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/test-scenario PR rather than a current-main bug report. The contributor did provide local after-fix QA suite and gallery-loader output for the new scenario path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocker is stacked-branch and contract direction work, not a safe isolated automated repair on the current conflicting PR head.

target.title: test: add QA Lab UX Matrix evidence scenario
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a QA Lab `ux-matrix-evidence-dashboard` scenario that runs the UX Matrix dashboard as a Vitest-backed native test scenario.
- Let script-backed QA scenarios publish validated sidecar QA evidence summaries, including generated logs, screenshot pointers, and gallery model artifacts, while keeping failed native commands on the runner failure path.
- Teach suite/report status mapping and the Evidence Gallery to preserve blocked/skipped evidence honestly and load merged suite evidence from child producer roots.

## Stack Notes

- Stacked after #94283 / `Solvely-Colin:codex/qa-lab-evidence-gallery-main`.
- This branch was rebased onto #94283 head `335dcbf4df47fcfbdbe7458a2b00e13a9d069b48` before PR creation.
- The upstream repo cannot use the cross-repository #94283 branch as the PR base, so this PR targets `main`; after #94283 lands, this diff should collapse to the UX Matrix scenario slice.
- No GitHub Actions, smoke profile, or workflow wiring is included; that is intentionally left for the next slice.
- The scenario uses existing taxonomy coverage IDs: `qa.artifact-safety`, `tools.evidence`, `workspace.artifacts`, `ui.control`, `control-ui`, `cli-entrypoint`, and `status-snapshots`.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-gallery.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-gallery.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-launch.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-launch.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/test-file-scenario-runner.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/test-file-scenario-runner.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/ux-matrix-evidence.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts qa/scenarios/ui/ux-matrix-evidence-dashboard.yaml`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/test-file-scenario-runner.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-launch.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/ux-matrix-evidence.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-gallery.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `OPENCLAW_BUILD_PRIVATE_QA=1 pnpm openclaw qa suite --scenario ux-matrix-evidence-dashboard --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/ux-matrix-sample --allow-failures`
- `node --import tsx --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; import { buildQaEvidenceGalleryModel } from './extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-gallery.ts'; const summary=JSON.parse(readFileSync('.artifacts/qa-e2e/ux-matrix-sample/qa-suite-summary.json','utf8')); const evidence=JSON.parse(readFileSync('.artifacts/qa-e2e/ux-matrix-sample/qa-evidence.json','utf8')); const model=await buildQaEvidenceGalleryModel({ evidencePath: '.artifacts/qa-e2e/ux-matrix-sample/qa-evidence.json', repoRoot: process.cwd() }); const entryArtifacts=(entry)=>entry.artifacts ?? entry.execution?.artifacts ?? []; console.log(JSON.stringify({ summaryCounts: summary.counts, summaryStatuses: summary.scenarios.map((s)=>s.status), evidenceEntries: evidence.entries.map((e)=>({ id: e.test?.id, status: e.result?.status, coverage: e.coverage?.map((c)=>c.id) ?? [], artifactKinds: entryArtifacts(e).map((a)=>a.kind) })), galleryCounts: model.counts, galleryEntries: model.entries.map((e)=>({ id: e.id, status: e.status, artifactKinds: e.artifacts.map((a)=>a.kind) })) }, null, 2));"`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt "Review this OpenClaw stacked QA Lab slice after final gallery/failure fixes. It adds a Vitest-backed UX Matrix QA scenario, lets native test scenarios publish a validated sidecar QA evidence summary, removes declared sidecars before each run to avoid stale evidence, only accepts sidecar evidence when the native command succeeds, falls back to native failure evidence on command failure, folds non-pass sidecar evidence into native scenario status, maps blocked/skipped native evidence to suite/report skip status while preserving evidence.status details, strips sidecar execution blocks for slim evidence mode, teaches the Evidence Gallery to discover child producer roots for slim merged suite evidence, and verifies Evidence Gallery can load the UX Matrix producer files. Focus on correctness of evidence paths, scenario output isolation, gallery consumability, slim/full evidence mode consistency, and blocked/skipped status propagation. Ignore generated .artifacts, dist, and node_modules."`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: QA Lab now has a repeatable UX Matrix evidence scenario that runs through the native scenario runner, emits structured QA evidence entries, and can be loaded by the Evidence Gallery from the merged suite evidence file.

Real environment tested: Local macOS source checkout, Node reported by the scenario as `v25.5.0`, branch `codex/qa-lab-ux-matrix-scenario`, commit `e92898cedc07779479ed67e465adb34848b60e6a`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See the Verification section above.

Evidence after fix: The sample suite wrote `.artifacts/qa-e2e/ux-matrix-sample/qa-suite-summary.json`, `.artifacts/qa-e2e/ux-matrix-sample/qa-evidence.json`, and `.artifacts/qa-e2e/ux-matrix-sample/qa-suite-report.md`; the gallery loader returned counts `{ pass: 3, fail: 0, blocked: 0, skipped: 0 }`.

Observed result after fix: The UX Matrix scenario passed with three evidence entries: `ux-matrix.qa-lab.evidence-model` with log and gallery model JSON artifacts, `ux-matrix.control-ui.evidence-gallery-preview` with log and screenshot artifacts, and `ux-matrix.cli.entrypoint-help` with a CLI help log artifact.

What was not tested: GitHub Actions/profile wiring was intentionally not added or tested in this PR. The local QA suite command also printed existing local doctor/config warnings about plugin install metadata and a disabled BlueBubbles config entry; those warnings did not fail the scenario.
target.author: solvely-colin

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: Solvely-Colin
